greeting:
We design and build **custom AI voice hardware**, end to end. A North America team backed by our own China factory, building voice hardware **since 2009**, we take you **from concept to mass production**: wearable recorders, call-answering devices, speakers, headsets, smart glasses & pens, and dev kits.
Where would you like to start? 👇

odm.intro: Full custom builds: your own device from the ground up, covering industrial design, PCB, acoustics, firmware and mass production. We've built voice hardware for healthcare, field service and consumer brands.

add-branding.intro: Take one of our proven devices and make it yours: your logo, colors, packaging, even firmware tweaks. Faster and lower cost than a full custom build. (Also known as private label / OEM.)

product_reference: Our real product lines (recommend ONLY from these; never invent model names or specs, never state a spec that isn't listed here). Wearable recorders (HA-MIC06B/06A/05/04): MIC05 and MIC06A are secure clinical-grade recorders with NFC-encrypted access, on-device storage (1GB), and MIC05 adds hardware noise reduction. Call-answering (Phone Entry): Telalive turns a desk phone into a 24/7 AI receptionist; HA-TEL02 is a 4G handheld assistant. Speakers: HA-SPK01 (IPX7 waterproof mini), HA-SPK03 (IPX5). Headsets: HA-BC01 (bone-conduction, IPX6, rugged for outdoor use), plus OWS/TWS earbuds. Field push-to-talk device: HA-MIC01. Smart devices: HA-GLS01 glasses, HA-PEN01 pen, translator and toy devices. Dev & modules: an ESP32 kit for embedding our voice AI into your own product. If nothing clearly fits, point them to gmic.ai/products and offer to connect a specialist; never guess a spec you are unsure of.

contacts.value: Scan to add us on WeChat

faq.a: GMIC AI designs and manufactures custom AI voice hardware: AI voice recorders, wearable microphones, smart badges, AI scribe devices, and Bluetooth/Wi-Fi audio products. We take it end to end, from design and firmware to mass production. Tell us what you have in mind and we'll see how we can help.

faq.q: Do you offer custom / white-label (ODM/OEM)? What is the MOQ?
faq.a: Yes. Full ODM/OEM is our core: custom enclosure, firmware, tuning, and mass production, all under your brand. Custom / private-label projects typically start around 2,000 units, though it depends on the build. Tell us what you're building and your target quantity, and we'll give you an exact figure.

faq.q: Which industries / use cases do you support?
faq.a: We support voice capture across healthcare and clinical scribing, field service, sales and meetings, public safety, logistics, and enterprise, essentially anywhere speech needs to become text or action. If you have a specific use case, describe it and we'll tell you how we'd approach it.

faq.q: How long for samples / mass production?
faq.a: Timelines depend on complexity and customization, but a typical path is a few weeks for samples and several weeks for mass production once specs are locked. Share your project and timeline and we'll give you a realistic schedule.

faq.q: How do I get in touch / request a quote?
faq.a: The fastest way is to leave your email here with a short note on what you need, and a real member of our ODM team will personally follow up with details and a quote. You can also reach us directly on our WhatsApp, email (trigg@gmic.ai), or book a call using the buttons above.
